mapper.select: /* ProjectMainDao.getProjectMainList */ select odoc_sn , user_id , odoc_nm , to_char(frst_reg_dt, 'YYYY. MM. DD') as frst_reg_dt , end_yn from t_odoc_main where user_id = #{userId} and del_yn = 'N' order by case when end_yn = 'N' then 0 else 1 end asc, odoc_sn desc

/* ProjectMainDao.getProjectMain */ select a.odoc_sn , a.user_id , a.odoc_nm , to_char(a.frst_reg_dt, 'YYYY. MM. DD') as frst_reg_dt , a.end_yn , TO_CHAR((CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date, 'MM') AS odoc_month , ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(b.odoc_dt))::numeric / EXTRACT(DAY FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day') * 100 , 1) AS progress , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_odoc_dtl d WHERE d.user_id = a.user_id AND d.odoc_sn = a.odoc_sn AND DATE(d.odoc_dt) = (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS odoc_yn from t_odoc_main a left join t_odoc_dtl b on a.user_id = b.user_id and a.odoc_sn = b.odoc_sn and b.odoc_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date) and b.odoc_dt < DATE_TRUNC('month', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date) + INTERVAL '1 month' where a.user_id = #{userId} and a.odoc_sn = #{odocSn} group by a.odoc_sn, a.user_id, a.odoc_nm, a.frst_reg_dt, a.end_yn

/* ProjectMainDao.getHistYearList */ select TO_CHAR(b.odoc_dt, 'YYYY') AS year , TO_CHAR(b.odoc_dt, 'MM') AS month , ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(b.odoc_dt))::numeric / EXTRACT( DAY FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', b.odoc_dt) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day' ) * 100 , 1) AS progress from t_odoc_main a left join t_odoc_dtl b on a.user_id = b.user_id and a.odoc_sn = b.odoc_sn where a.user_id = #{userId} and a.odoc_sn = #{odocSn} and b.odoc_dt IS NOT NULL group by TO_CHAR(b.odoc_dt, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR(b.odoc_dt, 'MM'), DATE_TRUNC('month', b.odoc_dt) order by year desc, month desc

/* ProjectMainDao.getHistMonth */ select a.odoc_nm ,CASE WHEN DATE_TRUNC('month', a.frst_reg_dt) = DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(#{year} || '-' || #{month}, 'YYYY-MM')) THEN TO_CHAR(a.frst_reg_dt, 'DD')::int ELSE NULL END AS created_day , ARRAY_TO_STRING( ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT TO_CHAR(DATE(b.odoc_dt), 'DD')), ',' ) AS checked_dates , ARRAY_TO_STRING( ARRAY_AGG(to_char(b.odoc_dt, 'HH24시 MI분')), ',' ) AS checked_timestamps , ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(b.odoc_dt))::numeric / EXTRACT( DAY FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(#{year} || '-' || #{month}, 'YYYY-MM')) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day' ) * 100 , 1) AS progress from t_odoc_main a left join t_odoc_dtl b on a.user_id = b.user_id and a.odoc_sn = b.odoc_sn and b.odoc_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(#{year} || '-' || #{month}, 'YYYY-MM')) and b.odoc_dt < DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(#{year} || '-' || #{month}, 'YYYY-MM')) + INTERVAL '1 month' where a.user_id = #{userId} and a.odoc_sn = #{odocSn} group by a.odoc_nm, a.frst_reg_dt
